'''Enisca''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that, along with [[Sern Prime/Legends|Sern Prime]] and [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], were considered prime candidates for anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] rebellion by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
